title: Policewala
desc: A skilled relationship saboteur helps parents separate couples and operates from the marriage office. While helping a young woman split up her sister's relationship, he falls in love with her. 'Yeh Hai Adda' stars Sushanth and Shanvi in lead roles.

title: Policewala
desc: A young man, whose father fell victim to a gangster's violence, grows up to enlist in the police. During his pursuit of a notorious gang, he unintentionally uncovers the identity of his father's killer. 'Policewala' stars Chunky Pandey, Sonam, Vinod Mehra, Amjad Khan and Shakti Kapoor.

title: Legend The Terror (Hindi)
desc: Unable to live up to his father's expectations, Heera battles against adversity to uphold his family's honor and pride. 'Sooryavansham' stars Amitabh Bachchan in a double role, along with Soundarya, Jayasudha, Rachna Banerjee, Kader Khan, Anupam Kher, Mukesh Rishi and Aanand Vardhan.

title: Mubarakan
desc: Orphaned twins who are raised separately turn to their quirky unmarried uncle for romantic advice, unaware of the chaos and confusion in store for them. 'Mubarakan' stars Anil Kapoor, Arjun Kapoor, Ileana D'Cruz, Athiya Shetty, Neha Sharma, Ratna Pathak Shah, Karan Kundra, Rahul Dev, Pavan Malhotra and Sanjay Kapoor.

title: Darr@ The Mall
desc: A newly built mall becomes shrouded in mystery as several workers die mysteriously during construction. A security guard unravels the haunting secret behind the mall's dark past. The horror movie stars Jimmy Sheirgill, Nushratt Bharucha, Arif Zakaria and Asif Basra.

title: Darr@ The Mall
desc: A newly built mall becomes shrouded in mystery as several workers die mysteriously during construction. A security guard unravels the haunting secret behind the mall's dark past. The horror movie stars Jimmy Sheirgill, Nushratt Bharucha, Arif Zakaria and Asif Basra.

title: No Parking
desc: Arun is an architect who has a loving mother, and a beautiful girlfriend. Things go haywire when he parks his bike in a "No Parking" zone. This takes him on a roller coaster ride full of lies and deceit.

title: Charms Bond
desc: Hilarity ensues when a young man, his cousin and a friend hatch a plan to steal money from his miserly step-mother. 'Charms Bond' stars Priya Anand, Yogi Babu and Mirchi Shiva.

title: Lucifer
desc: After the death of the ruling party's supreme leader in God's own country, a power vaccuum gives rise to unprecedent forces in the chaos for succession, impacting both the party and state. The 2019 Malayalam blockbuster Lucifer stars Mohanlal, Vivek Oberois and Manju Warrier.

title: Baadshah Pehlwaan
desc: Krishna is an orphan who is being brought up by a gym owner whose name is Sarkar. Krishna beats the odds to become a Baadshah Pehlwaan, but when he falls in love, he gets into a dispute with himself.

title: Ek Ka Dum 1
desc: A young musician with a psychological disorder is convinced that three men murdered his parents. However, he is unable to identify any of them. Will he be able to get to the bottom of the mystery? '1: Ek Ka Dum' stars Mahesh Babu, Kriti Sanon, Nassar, Pradeep Rawat and Kelly Dorji.

title: The Real Leader Brahma
desc: A feared gangster escapes the cops and heads on a covert mission to Malaysia, where, he encounters a woman who falls for him. Upon his return to India, she follows him, leading to a tale of unraveling secrets, missions and a link to a 16th-century warrior. Can the police apprehend him for his crimes? The action-drama stars Upendra, Pranitha Subhash, Sara Sharmaa, Nasser and Sayaji Shinde.

title: Gunda Mawali
desc: A beautiful woman and an auto driver fake a romantic relationship to deter suitors, but their plan backfires as they unexpectedly develop real feelings for each other. The romantic-drama movie stars Nagarjuna, Deepti Bhatnagar, Simran and Dara Singh.

title: Firangi
desc: Set in the 1920s, the undisputed King of Comedy Kapil Sharma plays a young man with the unique ability to cure backaches with a kick. However, the family of the girl he wants to marry rejects his proposal as he serves the very people against whom they have been fighting for independence. 'Firangi' also stars Ishita Dutta and Monica Gill.
